case_title: ERIK VAN DEN AKKER VS. JULIO CESAR CARMONA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION MAILING ADDRESS UPDATE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CARMONA, JULIO CESAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF ERIK VAN DEN AKKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIO CESAR CARMONA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VAN DEN AKKER, ERIK AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA, JULIO CESAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$105.00) SERVED SEP-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA, JULIO CESAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAN DEN AKKER, ERIK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARMONA, JULIO CESAR $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,180.00, SEE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM FOR STATEMENT OF REASONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
